findings.title: TLS 1.0 still enabled on load balancer
findings.description: The load balancer accepts TLS 1.0. Disable legacy protocols and enforce TLS 1.2+.

findings.title: Verbose 500 stack trace on public endpoint
findings.description: The public API returns a verbose 500 with a full stack trace. Generic infrastructure issue with no agent-specific indicators.

findings.title: Dependency with a known advisory in requirements.txt
findings.description: A pinned library version has a published advisory. Bump to the patched release.

findings.title: S3 bucket allows public list
findings.description: An object-storage bucket permits anonymous listing. Restrict to authenticated principals.
